title: Sweet and Zesty Norwegian Tomatoes Stuvet
description: A hearty, crowd-pleasing Norwegian dish featuring chewy tomatoes and a sweet, tangy sauce.

ingredients.name: Large tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Cherry or grape tomatoes work well too

ingredients.name: Fresh parsley
ingredients.notes: Chopped and used as a garnish

instructions: Melt the butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the chopped tomatoes and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Sprinkle the flour over the tomato mixture and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually pour in the beef broth, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the granulated sugar and apple cider vinegar.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the stuvet hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
